overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage following pedestrians through a rainy neon-lit futuristic city. The camera moves through covered hotel walkways and open streets with reflective wet surfaces, showcasing cyberpunk architecture with the 'Wild Blue' establishment as a recurring landmark.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered hotel corridor with a colorful neon grid ceiling that shifts from cyan to magenta. The 'Wild Blue' sign is visible on the left wall amid tropical plants and benches. A pedestrian with an umbrella approaches and passes by.

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered corridor into an open rainy plaza surrounded by futuristic glass skyscrapers including one marked '05'. The camera crosses the wet asphalt street with reflective surfaces, following a pedestrian with an umbrella amid sparse traffic and palm trees.

segments.scene_description: Following a character with distinctive pink boots up concrete stairs beneath the colorful grid ceiling. The camera ascends to the top, turns around, and begins descending, with the 'Wild Blue' sign visible at the stairway summit.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-soaked city street lined with towering futuristic skyscrapers and bright digital billboards. The wet pavement reflects the neon lights as the camera follows a pedestrian with an umbrella through the cyberpunk cityscape.

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered walkway featuring the illuminated 'Wild Blue Hotel & Spa' neon sign. The wooden deck walkway is lined with potted plants and digital directory signs as the camera follows pedestrians with umbrellas through the sheltered corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that weaves between sheltered neon corridors and open, rain-slicked city plazas. It begins within a covered hotel corridor under a shifting cyan and magenta grid ceiling, passing tropical plants and the Wild Blue sign before emerging into an open rainy plaza surrounded by glass skyscrapers. The camera then pivots to follow a pedestrian in pink boots up and down a set of concrete stairs beneath the colorful ceiling, before shifting back out onto the wet asphalt of a city street lined with towering digital billboards. Finally, the scene transitions from the open cityscape back into a sheltered wooden walkway, following pedestrians with umbrellas past potted plants and the illuminated Wild Blue Hotel & Spa sign.
